task_context.description: Terminal double typing issue - characters appearing twice
original_symptoms: Duplicate debug logs showing multiple writes
Concurrent write operations causing character duplication

problem_analysis.root_cause: Duplicate event handler registration and concurrent write operations

debug_evidence: 📊 Cursor after write: x=47, y=12 (MULTIPLE TIMES)

technical_causes: Multiple event handlers registered for same terminal events
Concurrent WebSocket connections writing to same terminal instance
Race conditions between multiple write operations
Missing concurrency control for terminal.write() calls

solution_implementation.approach: Event Deduplication System with Concurrency Control

event_deduplication.mechanism: processedEventIds tracking with Set data structure
event_deduplication.purpose: Prevent processing same event multiple times

concurrency_control.mechanism: isWriting flag for write operation synchronization
concurrency_control.purpose: Prevent concurrent write operations to terminal

event_handler_registration.mechanism: eventHandlersRegistered flag to prevent duplicate registration
event_handler_registration.purpose: Ensure event handlers only registered once per component instance

cleanup_system.mechanism: Comprehensive cleanup of event listeners and references
cleanup_system.purpose: Prevent memory leaks and stale event handlers

write_deduplication.before: terminal.write(data); // Could be called multiple times
write_deduplication.after: if (!isWriting.current && !processedEventIds.current.has(eventId)) { isWriting.current = true; terminal.write(data); isWriting.current = false; processedEventIds.current.add(eventId); }

event_handler_prevention.before: socket.on('terminal:output', handler); // Called on every render

tdd_methodology.approach: London School TDD with mock-driven development

test_categories: Event Listener Cleanup and Memory Leaks (3 tests)

red_phase.test_results: All tests fail showing duplicate operations

green_phase.test_results: All tests pass after implementing deduplication system
green_phase.validation: Integration tests confirm single write operations

test_validation_metrics.mock_verification: All write operations verified to occur exactly once
test_validation_metrics.behavior_verification: Event handler registration tracked and prevented
test_validation_metrics.regression_prevention: Tests act as regression suite for future changes

changes: Added event deduplication system with processedEventIds Set
Implemented write operation concurrency control with isWriting flag
Comprehensive cleanup system for component unmount

state_management.purpose: Maintain state across renders without triggering re-renders

event_handling.implementation: Event ID generation and tracking system
event_handling.cleanup: Comprehensive listener removal and reference clearing

performance_impact.memory_usage: Minimal overhead from Set data structure
performance_impact.latency_improvement: Eliminated duplicate operations reduces processing time
performance_impact.resource_cleanup: Prevented memory leaks from stale event handlers

event_deduplication.implementation: Check event ID before processing, add to Set after
event_deduplication.use_case: Prevent duplicate event processing in any component

concurrency_control.implementation: Set flag before operation, clear after completion
concurrency_control.use_case: Prevent concurrent write operations to shared resources

registration_prevention.implementation: Check flag before registering, set flag after registration

tdd_practices.mock_driven_development: Use mocks to verify behavior not just state
tdd_practices.behavior_verification: Test that operations occur exactly expected number of times
tdd_practices.regression_prevention: Comprehensive test suite prevents future regressions

architectural_guidelines.ref_based_state: Use useRef for state that doesn't trigger re-renders
architectural_guidelines.cleanup_patterns: Always implement comprehensive cleanup in useEffect
architectural_guidelines.defensive_programming: Check state before operations to prevent duplicates
architectural_guidelines.event_lifecycle: Manage complete event lifecycle from registration to cleanup

technical: Event deduplication is critical in React components with external event sources
Concurrency control prevents race conditions in terminal operations
useRef is essential for state that shouldn't trigger re-renders
Comprehensive cleanup prevents memory leaks and stale handlers
process: TDD approach identified the problem precisely through failing tests
Mock-driven development revealed behavior issues not just state issues
Systematic debugging with logs provided clear evidence of root cause
Integration testing validated the complete solution
architectural: Terminal components require careful event lifecycle management
WebSocket integration needs deduplication at multiple layers
React component lifecycle and external events need coordination
Performance optimization through elimination of duplicate operations

similar_scenarios: WebSocket event handling in any real-time component
Terminal or console applications with character-level input
Real-time collaboration tools with event synchronization
Gaming applications with rapid input handling
preventive_measures: Always implement event deduplication for external event sources
Use concurrency control for shared resource access
Implement comprehensive cleanup in React components
Apply TDD methodology for complex interaction scenarios
pattern_evolution: Extend to handle multiple concurrent terminals
Add event batching for performance optimization
Implement event replay for debugging purposes
Create reusable hooks for event deduplication
